home_h1_pre: From Startup to Scale-Up — We Power Your
home_intro: Wherever you are in your journey, InfoGate keeps you compliant, secure, and ready to expand. Our unified AI-powered platform makes business processes simple, swift, and seamless.
home_stat_focus_value: To be the leading platform enabling smart technology decisions across the region.
home_stat_delivery_value: Empowering businesses and organizations to adopt innovative technology easily, effectively, and sustainably.
home_deep_body: In a world overflowing with fragmented tools, InfoGate provides the unified digital environment your business deserves. We are more than a platform; we are an innovative data and IT ecosystem that empowers you to identify, assess, and implement the right digital solutions for your unique operational needs.
home_steps_discover_body: Gain a 360-degree view of your business tools and data in one secure place.
home_steps_connect_body: Move from guesswork to data-driven strategy with AI-powered insights.
home_steps_grow_body: Streamline technology integration and enhance process efficiency. Digital transformation becomes faster, easier, and more effective.
home_offer_body: Our ecosystem includes Oman Survey, Smart Registration, Digital Business Cards, Social Media Marketing, Quick Process Automation (QPA), and Electronic Accounting & E-Invoicing.
home_offer_card1_body: The Sultanate's modern digital platform for data intelligence. Features: Strategic Insights, Brand Integration, Effortless Sharing.
home_offer_card2_body: Transform how you onboard participants. Features: Efficiency, Accessibility, Scalability.
home_offer_card3_body: The Last Card You'll Ever Need. Features: Instant Sharing, Dynamic Content, Environmentally Conscious, Lead Capture.
home_offer_card4_body: Turn Conversations into Conversions. Features: Strategic Growth, Content Management, Targeted Advertising, Performance Analytics. Plus: Quick Process Automation (QPA) and Electronic Accounting & E-Invoicing for workflow and financial excellence.
home_lead_title: Ready to Step Through the Gate?
home_lead_body: Join the community of forward-thinking businesses using InfoGate to modernize operations, elevate decisions, and unlock scalable growth.
home_lead_bullet1: Unified Interface: Manage your leads, marketing, and automation from a single dashboard.
home_lead_bullet2: Scalable Solutions: Our tools grow with you as your business expands.
home_lead_bullet3: Data-Driven DNA: Every tool we offer is built to provide actionable insights.

footer_tagline: InfoGate - The Gateway to Data & Technology
footer_start_project_body: Tell us about your goals—we reply with next steps.
footer_warning: Unauthorized use, reproduction, or distribution of any content from this website is strictly prohibited without prior written consent from InfoGate.

contact_intro: Use this form for new SEO leads, website builds, or partnerships. When configured with Web3Forms, submissions arrive directly in your email inbox—perfect if you’re offering the same kind of service to your own clients.
contact_email_hint: Prefer email? Share your project details in the form—we reply from the same thread so nothing gets lost.
contact_form_subheading: Fields marked * are required. We never share your details.
about_title: We connect the pieces behind your online growth
about_intro: {site} exists to make search and websites feel less chaotic. Our logo arc is a reminder: technical SEO, content, design, and analytics should fit together, not fight each other.
about_how_p1: We start with your business goals, then map the search landscape. You get a plain-language plan: what to fix on the site, what to publish, and how we measure success. No black boxes, just structured execution.
about_how_p2: Whether you need a full SEO retainer or a new marketing site with lead capture, we build for speed, clarity, and conversions.
about_bullet2: Modern stacks (e.g. Next.js) when we build sites
about_bullet4: Collaboration with your team or agency partners
about_cta_body: Share your URL and goals. We will tell you honestly if we are the right fit.
services_intro: Everything we offer ladders up to one outcome: your brand is easy to find, easy to trust, and easy to buy from. Mix and match what you need.
services_item1_desc: Crawl issues, indexation, Core Web Vitals, and a prioritized fix list with business impact in mind.
services_item2_desc: Titles, schema, internal linking, and entity-rich content plans aligned to how your customers search.
services_item3_desc: Profiles, reviews strategy, localized landing pages, and consistency across directories.
services_item4_desc: Marketing sites with strong UX, performance, and forms that send leads to your email pipeline.
services_item5_desc: GA4, Search Console, conversion events, so you know which pages earn revenue, not just clicks.
services_item6_desc: Monthly execution: content, links where appropriate, tests, and executive summaries.
services_cta_body: Tell us your site and goals. We will recommend a starting package.
pricing_intro: We don’t hide behind generic ₹/mo numbers on a page—every market and site is different. Use these tiers as a guide; we’ll confirm scope after a short call or form.
pricing_tier1_blurb: Best for new sites or one-off audits.
pricing_tier2_blurb: For teams ready to publish and iterate monthly.
pricing_tier3_blurb: New build with SEO baked in from day one.
pricing_note: All quotes include timeline, deliverables, and what success looks like for {site} clients.
blog_intro: Practical notes on search, websites, and measurement—written for founders and marketing teams, not algorithms.
